drills.name: Complete circle tracking drill
drills.description: Practice cutting complete circles on gauze material, focusing on maintaining continuous cutting motion around the entire circumference without stopping

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and maintain optimal cutting position throughout the circle
drills.targets_weakness: Incomplete task performance due to suboptimal cutting technique

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing full task sequences consistently before working on speed improvements. Practice complete circle cuts to build confidence in continuous cutting motion.
